faqData.question: What time should we arrive at the venue?
faqData.answer: The ceremony will begin at 4:00 PM. We kindly ask guests to arrive about 30 minutes earlier to allow time for seating.

faqData.question: Is there parking available at the venue?
faqData.answer: Yes, parking is available at the venue. There will be designated parking areas for guests.

faqData.question: Are kids allowed at the events?
faqData.answer: As much as we adore children, our wedding will be an adults-only celebration. We hope you understand and can enjoy a special night out with us.

faqData.question: Can I bring a plus one?
faqData.answer: We kindly ask that you attend according to the number of seats reserved for you. Additional guests not included in your RSVP will have a fee of 1,850 PHP per person. If you would like to add a guest, please let us know on or before April 10. Thank you for your understanding.
